ideas.title: CoreML Model Swap for Traffic Signs
ideas.raw_idea: Replace placeholder traffic sign recognition with real CoreML model
ideas.notes: Requires trained CoreML model. Blocked until model is available.

ideas.title: Offline Rule Engine
ideas.raw_idea: Local rule-based answer engine for common question types without LLM
ideas.notes: Reduces API dependency. Good for monetization (premium offline mode).

ideas.title: Android Version
ideas.raw_idea: Port AskFin to Android using Kotlin/Compose
ideas.notes: Requires Android agent in factory. Post-MVP.

ideas.title: Factory Template System Expansion
ideas.raw_idea: Add docs and planning templates to AutoGen beyond feature/screen/service/viewmodel
ideas.notes: Current templates only generate code. Need docs/review/planning templates.

ideas.title: Premium Subscription Model
ideas.raw_idea: In-app subscription for unlimited AI answers, offline mode, ad-free
ideas.notes: Depends on: Offline Rule Engine, stable LLM API integration.
